name: IBW Financial Corporation
summary: IBW Financial Corporation operates as the bank holding company for Industrial Bank that provides various banking and financial products and services to individual consumers, small-and middle-market businesses, and government agencies in the Washington, the District of Columbia. The company offers checking, savings, and certificate of deposit accounts; savings and investments products; mortgages; business credit and financing, sba loans, non-profit and faith-based lending, commercial real estate financing, and short- and long-term financing; and cash management products. IBW Financial Corporation was founded in 1934 and is based in Washington, the District of Columbia.
